sql.if: AND (b.user_id = #{key} or b.user_name like concat('%',#{key},'%') or b.user_id like concat('%',#{key},'%'))
AND not exists (select mch.user_id from lkt_comments com left join lkt_product_list list on list.id=com.pid left join lkt_mch mch on mch.id=list.mch_id where com.id=a.cid and mch.user_id=b.user_id)

mapper.select: select count(1) from lkt_reply_comments a left join lkt_user b on a.uid=b.user_id left join lkt_user c on c.user_id=a.to_uid
